zh.lifeSummary: 當Lettice Withers於1304年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩時，她的父親Thomas Withers35歲，母親Mrs Thomas Withers34歲。她於1324年與Sir John Cokayne Esquire在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在她的家鄉享年56歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lettice Withers于1304年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩时，她的父亲Thomas Withers35岁，母亲Mrs Thomas Withers34岁。她于1324年与Sir John Cokayne Esquire在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在她的家乡享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: Withers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Wither , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Wither
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Wither or its Old Norse cognate Vitharr, Withar.
perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a willow tree, from an agent derivative of Middle English withi ‘willow’ (Old English wīthig). Compare Withey .

nameMeanings.name: Lettice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the medieval vernacular form of the Latin name   Laetitia .  It was in use in Britain in the Middle Ages, but then fell out of use until revived by the Victorians. It is now once again out of fashion.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lettice Withers was born in 1304, in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, her father, Thomas Withers, was 35 and her mother, Mrs Thomas Withers, was 34. She married Sir John Cokayne Esquire in 1324, in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1360, in her hometown, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lettice Withers est née en 1304, à Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Withers, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mrs Thomas Withers, avait 34 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cokayne Esquire en 1324, à Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lettice Withers 1304 in Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Withers 35 und ihre Mutter Mrs Thomas Withers 34. Sie hat 1324 in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England Sir John Cokayne Esquire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 56 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Withers è nata il nel 1304 nel Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Withers, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Mrs Thomas Withers, aveva 34 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cokayne Esquire nel 1324, nel Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lettice Withersが1304年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルンで生まれた時，父Thomas Withersは35歳，母Mrs Thomas Withersは34歳であった。1324年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルン シルクウイトでSir John Cokayne Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年に故郷で56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lettice Withers(이)가 1304년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Withers(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Thomas Withers(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1324년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른 시르c이에서 Sir John Cokayne Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 그녀의 고향에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lettice Withers nasceu em 1304, em Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Withers, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Thomas Withers, tinha 34 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cokayne Esquire em 1324, em Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em sua cidade natal, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lettice Withers родилась в 1304 г. в местности ашбурн, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Withers было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Thomas Withers, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cokayne Esquire в 1324 г. в местности ашбурн сиркуит, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lettice Withers nació en 1304, en Ashbourne, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Withers, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Mrs Thomas Withers, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Sir John Cokayne Esquire en 1324, en Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1360, en su pueblo, a la edad de 56 años.
